contentList.content: When an enemy dies within 15 ft of you, you empower your weapon with that creature's soul's energy. Your next weapon attack does necrotic damage equal to half your fighter level.

You are empowered with a soul severed from your enemy. Until the end of your next turn, if your next attack connects, it inflicts additional necrotic damage equal to half your fighter level plus your Constitution modifier.
You are a Raven Knight, charged by the Raven Queen herself to protect Her realm and the Shadowfel from all those who would abuse its dark power.

When an enemy dies within 15 ft of you, you empower your weapon with that creature's soul's energy. Until the end of your next turn, if your next attack connects, it inflicts additional necrotic damage equal to half your fighter level plus your Constitution modifier.

You move with the grace of the raven. Your walking speed increases by 10ft. Additionally, as a bonus action, you gain a flight speed equal to your walking speed until the end of your turn. If you end your turn in midair, you drop to the ground.
You gain flight speed equal to your walking speed until the end of your turn.
You gain flight speed equal to your walking speed until the end of your turn.
This being's soul has been removed from its body rendering it impossible to be raised from the dead.
Raise a corpse as a heinous mummy that fights by your side.
Death is but a temporary inconvenience - raise a fallen undead with half of its <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag>.
Death is but a temporary inconvenience - raise a fallen undead with all of its <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag>.
Release spores at a corpse to animate it as a spore servant under your command.
Create an undead servant from a corpse.
Animate a pile of bones or a corpse to serve you.
Create 3 ghouls that specialise in melee combat.
Create a zombie that specialises in melee combat.
Create a ghoul that specialises in melee combat.
Raise a mildewed, mould-encrusted zombie from a corpse.
Create a skeleton that specialises in ranged combat.
Create 3 zombies that specialise in melee combat.
Create a zombie that specialises in melee combat.
You can summon a raven companion in the color of your choosing.
Summon a raven in the color of your choosing.
Summon a black raven familiar that can <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_RendVision_RavenFamiliar_Summon">Blind</LSTag> enemies with its beak.
Summon a white raven familiar that can <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_RendVision_RavenFamiliar_Summon">Blind</LSTag> enemies with its beak.

You connect directly to the Shadowfell, channeling its energies into your strikes for one minute. You now gain the bonus damage from Soul Severing without the need to have recently killed an enemy. Additionally, when you kill an enemy in this state you coalesce their soul around your form, gaining temporary hit points equal to half your fighter level plus your proficiency bonus.

You connect directly to the Shadowfell, channeling its energies into your strikes for one minute. You now gain the bonus damage from Soul Severing without the need to have recently killed an enemy. Additionally, when you kill an enemy in this state you coalesce their soul around your form, gaining temporary hit points equal to half your fighter level plus your proficiency bonus. (Temporary HP resets upon enemy kill. It does not stack.)

You connect directly to the Shadowfell, channeling its energies into your strikes for one minute. You now gain the bonus damage from Soul Severing without the need to have recently killed an enemy. Additionally, when you kill an enemy in this state you coalesce their soul around your form, gaining temporary hit points equal to half your fighter level plus your proficiency bonus. (Temporary HP resets upon enemy kill. It does not stack.)
Receives [1] whenever the first enemy is killed per round and adds half your fighter level plus proficiency bonus necrotic damage to all attacks while active.
